flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at East Stroudsburg University of Pennsylvania fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (36.1% → 29.4%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at East Stroudsburg University of Pennsylvania rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 ($14.2k → $15.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at East Stroudsburg University of Pennsylvania vs the 2003–2007 baseline (43.8% vs 50.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at East Stroudsburg University of Pennsylvania fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
